title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies used by Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days with Claude Code: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building. The video references Tan's open-source gstack system and discusses agentic AI workflows.
